title: The Suicide Squad
subTitle: A group of misfits are coerced to work together for a dangerous mission in Corto Maltese. Despite their differences, they learn to trust each other and collaborate as a team.

title: Rocky IV
subTitle: Rocky trains his friend Apollo Creed for a match against Ivan Drago, an indestructible Russian boxer. However, when Apollo dies in the ring, Rocky vows to avenge his death.

title: The Pilgrim
subTitle: A convict escapes from prison and guises as a pastor to save himself from the sheriff. The sheriff cannot be outsmarted and is determined to take him into custody.

title: Mune
subTitle: Necross, the former guardian of the sun, turns evil and steals it. Now, Mune, Glim and Sohone, three friends, must work together to retrieve it back from him.

title: Born to Fight
subTitle: Dan Barnes, a former professional boxer, takes up the responsibility to coach Matthew Miller, a teenager who is repeatedly bullied by a school boxing champion and his friends.

title: StreetDance 2
subTitle: After an embarrassing defeat, a street dancer, Ash, assembles the best dancers from all across the world for another round against the Invincible crew.

title: Sinister 2
subTitle: Courtney Collins, a single mother, relocates to a rural home with her twin sons. Later, she discovers it's inhabited by malevolent spirits connected to the sinister entity Bughuul.

title: Impractical Jokers: The Movie
subTitle: When four lifelong friends receive three tickets from singer Paula Abdul to her concert, they compete in a series of pranks to decide which amongst them will attend the show.

title: The Hunger Games
subTitle: Katniss volunteers to replace her sister in a tournament that ends only when one participant remains. Pitted against contestants who have trained for this all their life, she has little to rely on.

title: Dune
subTitle: Paul, the young scion of House Atreides faces troubling visions of the future. Meanwhile, his family fights to gain control over Arrakis, the only source of the valuable spice melange.

title: Rocky
subTitle: An unknown boxer gets a chance to fight the world heavyweight champion, and he blindly jumps into the ring in a bid to earn respect and glory.

title: Edge of Tomorrow
subTitle: A soldier in an alien war repeats the same day each time he dies, teaming up with a skilled warrior to find and destroy the enemy's power source and break the time loop.

title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
subTitle: Ostracized by everyone for being the child of a cruel overlord, a teen assembles his fellow ninjas to fight off his father.

title: Rush Hour 2
subTitle: Detective James Carter and Chief Inspector Lee return to action after a bomb explosion at the US Embassy in Hong Kong.

title: Troy
subTitle: After Paris, a Trojan prince, has an affair with Menelaus's wife, Helen, he decides to take her with him. Later, Menelaus's brother uses that as an excuse to wage a war against the city of Troy.

title: Troy
subTitle: After Paris, a Trojan prince, has an affair with Menelaus's wife, Helen, he decides to take her with him. Later, Menelaus's brother uses that as an excuse to wage a war against the city of Troy.

title: Red Dawn
subTitle: A soldier and his brother escape into the woods when their city is invaded by North Korean paratroopers. After their father is killed, the brothers form a guerrilla group to fight back.

title: The Love Laugh Live Show
subTitle: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

title: The Love Laugh Live Show
subTitle: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

title: The Gold Rush
subTitle: During the Klondike Gold Rush, a lone prospector goes through a series of misfortunes, including a blizzard and starvation. However, he finds love even in the stormy Alaska.

title: No Escape
subTitle: Jack Dwyer and his family move to a country in Southeast Asia. However, a sudden and violent uprising forces them to flee or risk being executed.

title: Braven
subTitle: A logger and his father head to their hunting cabin, hoping for a quiet weekend. Instead, they find themselves in a kill-or-be-killed stand for survival when they encounter a gang of drug traffickers.

title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
subTitle: Katniss Everdeen realises that she is no longer fighting for survival. So, she sets out to assassinate the tyrannical President Snow and liberate the people of Panem.

title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
subTitle: Ostracized by everyone for being the child of a cruel overlord, a teen assembles his fellow ninjas to fight off his father.

title: The Suicide Squad
subTitle: A group of misfits are coerced to work together for a dangerous mission in Corto Maltese. Despite their differences, they learn to trust each other and collaborate as a team.

title: Shazam!
subTitle: After being abandoned at a fair, Billy constantly searches for his mother. His life, however, takes a huge turn when he inherits superpowers from a powerful wizard.

title: Now You See Me 2
subTitle: Dylan secretly guides the Horsemen as they reappear with a bold plan, only to be drawn into a tech billionaire's twisted scheme involving a powerful data chip.

title: Force of Execution
subTitle: A gangster, who seeks to retire from the life of crime, faces a threat when an upcoming rival challenges his authority. He then decides to take help from a trustworthy former apprentice.

title: Sherlock Holmes
subTitle: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson send Lord Henry Blackwood, a serial killer, to the gallows. However, they are shocked to learn that he is back from the dead and pursue him again.

title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
subTitle: A legendary monster named King Ghidorah awakens Rodan, as well as other titans, to destroy the world. To defeat them, the crypto-zoological organisation Monarch must rely on the almighty Godzilla.

title: Edge of Tomorrow
subTitle: A soldier in an alien war repeats the same day each time he dies, teaming up with a skilled warrior to find and destroy the enemy's power source and break the time loop.

title: Edge of Tomorrow
subTitle: A soldier in an alien war repeats the same day each time he dies, teaming up with a skilled warrior to find and destroy the enemy's power source and break the time loop.

title: City Lights
subTitle: The Tramp falls in love with a girl with visual impairment who sells flowers on the street. He tries to help her gain her eyesight back with the help of a wealthy man.

title: Superfast!
subTitle: Undercover agent Lucas White endeavours to join Vin Serento's gang of street racers. Together, they plan to steal a large amount of money from crime kingpin Juan Carlos.

title: Shoulder Arms
subTitle: Charlie joins a boot camp to become a national hero and gets posted to the front lines in France. He captures 13 Germans and rescues a French girl but later realises that it was just a dream.

title: Southpaw
subTitle: After a devastating accident shatters his world, a once-celebrated champion boxer spirals into a destructive abyss. Subsequently, he decides to fight for his daughter and revive his fading career.

title: Let Me In
subTitle: Owen leads a lonely life and is bullied by his peers at school. He happily befriends Abby, his new helpful neighbour, without being aware that she is hiding a secret from him.

title: Wild Card
subTitle: Nick works as a bodyguard while trying to overcome his gambling addiction. However, his life takes a turn when he learns of a brutal attack on his friend and sets out on a bloody quest for revenge.

title: The LEGO Batman Movie
subTitle: Batman and friends try to stop Joker from taking over Gotham city while trying to form a relationship with his adopted ward Dick Grayson, who becomes his sidekick.

title: Barely Lethal
subTitle: Megan Walsh, a special agent, is curious about teenage life experiences so she fakes her own death and enrols in high school. Soon, she realises the troubles of high school life.

title: Piranha 3DD
subTitle: The bloodthirsty piranhas head towards a local water park. Amidst the fun-seeking horde at the park are friends Maddy, Barry and Kyle who decide to take on the man-eating creatures.

title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
subTitle: The Decepticons are trying to learn the secrets of a stranded Cybertronian spacecraft. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must stop them before it is too late.

title: Stuart Little
subTitle: Upon getting adopted by the Littles, Stuart, a mouse, is unwelcomed by his new brother George. So, when Stuart begins to feel low the family helps him find his real parents.

title: 300: Rise of an Empire
subTitle: Xerxes, seeking revenge for his father's death, declares war on Greece. As a result, Themistocles, the Athenian admiral, is compelled to form an alliance with Sparta to protect Athens.

title: Superfast!
subTitle: Undercover agent Lucas White endeavours to join Vin Serento's gang of street racers. Together, they plan to steal a large amount of money from crime kingpin Juan Carlos.

title: No Escape
subTitle: Jack Dwyer and his family move to a country in Southeast Asia. However, a sudden and violent uprising forces them to flee or risk being executed.

title: Born to Fight
subTitle: Dan Barnes, a former professional boxer, takes up the responsibility to coach Matthew Miller, a teenager who is repeatedly bullied by a school boxing champion and his friends.
